calendar.matters: And Plaintiff'S Motion Compelling Compliance With Defnedant'S Production Of Documents Promised By Defendant'S Discovery Responses

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Xavier Hozven Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Benson Douglas Esq. 424-208-8410 Lehrman Villegas Chinery & Douglas LLP for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court clarifies what Plaintiff has received by way of emails
Mr. Hozven updates and apprises the court re documents not produced.
Mr. Douglas responds and states documents sent on multiple occasions; other customer complaints not relevant.
The Court comments.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSE MARTINEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions.

The Court denies the motion to compel including RFP#30. Defense' counsel to submit a proposed order reflecting the ruling. The matter is under submission while awaiting the order.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
